name: Daily Mean Temperature
description: The average temperature recorded over a 24-hour period.

name: Monthly average Daily maximum Temperature
description: The average of the daily maximum temperatures recorded over a month.

name: Monthly average Daily minimum Temperature
description: The average of the daily minimum temperatures recorded over a month.

name: Precipitation
description: The total amount of rainfall or snowfall converted to millimeters of water.

name: Potential Evapotranspiration
description: The amount of water that could be evaporated and transpired if sufficient water was available.

name: Cloud Cover
description: The fraction of the sky covered by clouds, expressed as a percentage.

name: Forest day frequency
description: Number of days in a month when frost conditions were observed.

name: Wet day frequency
description: Number of days in a month with precipitation greater than 1 mm.

name: Diurnal temperature range
description: The difference between the daily maximum and minimum temperatures.

name: Wind speed
description: The average speed of wind over a specified period.

name: Vapor Pressure
description: The pressure exerted by water vapor in the air.

name: Soil Moisture
unit: Cubic meters per cubic meter m³/m³
description: The amount of water contained in the soil, typically in the top 1–2 meters.
